title: KPop Demon Hunters Golden Wins Best Original Song at Golden Globes
text: Variety reported on the Golden Globes 2026 ceremony, where KPop Demon Hunters secured major awards. The film won Best Motion Picture - Animated, and its signature song Golden won Best Original Song. The recognition capped an extraordinary year for the animated feature, which had already won at the Critics Choice Awards and swept the Annie Awards. Variety's coverage highlighted the film's unprecedented success in streaming and its cultural impact. The publication noted that Golden became the highest-charting song from an animated film soundtrack in recent years, demonstrating the crossover appeal of the movie beyond traditional animation audiences. The dual wins positioned KPop Demon Hunters as the clear frontrunner for the Academy Award in the animated feature category.
